description_long: This is a reusable grocery bag with a rectangular body and two sturdy, rounded loop handles attached at the top. The bag features a black background adorned with a dense, white floral or abstract pattern that covers most of its surface, giving it a stylish and modern appearance. The lower portion of the bag displays a script-like text, possibly a brand name or decorative element, in white. The bag appears to be made from a flexible, fabric-like material, likely canvas or non-woven polypropylene, suitable for carrying groceries or personal items. The sides are narrow, and the bag maintains a flat, empty shape, indicating it is not currently filled. The overall design is both functional and visually appealing, making it suitable for urban shopping or daily use.
description: A black reusable grocery bag with white floral patterns, script text, and two rounded loop handles. The bag is flat and empty, made from a flexible fabric-like material.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full floral pattern, script text, and both loop handles clearly.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the bag's narrow profile and the continuation of the pattern along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, with the same pattern and handles visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the bag's slim profile and patterned surface.
attribute_branding_or_logo: Script text and white floral/abstract printed design on the exterior.
